title: Build OTC multi-tier proposal: Tier-A Open + Tier-B MerkleWhitelist (auto-derived root)
notes: Phase A — exercises dexe_proposal_build_token_sale_multi with mixed Open + MerkleWhitelist tiers. Auto-derives merkle root from users[]; verifies addToWhitelist NOT appended (merkle tier gates buyers via root, not whitelist NFT). Single sale token across both tiers must produce ONE deduped/summed approve action.

tiers.name: S41 Tier-B MerkleWhitelist
tiers.description: Gated by merkle root over 3 buyer addresses

args.proposalDescription: Phase A swarm — Open + MerkleWhitelist auto-root

successCriteria.check: built.actions length == 2 (1 approve + createTiers); NO addToWhitelist action because the only gated tier uses MerkleWhitelist (root-gated, not NFT-gated)
actions[0] is ERC20.approve(saleToken → TokenSaleProposal, sum=1500e18); only one approve because both tiers share the same sale token
actions[1].data starts with 0x6a6effda (createTiers selector) and encodes 2 tier tuples
built.metadata.changes.proposedChanges.derivedMerkleRoots length >= 1 (auto-derived from users[]) — should equal `0x` + 64 hex chars
